message:
fix(test): resolve 166 test failures from shared mock and concurrency regressions (#6924) (#6926)

Three root causes introduced in PR #6920:

1. useMissions.test.tsx (158 failures): startMission gained a skipReview
   gate that stashes params instead of creating missions. Tests did not
   pass skipReview:true, so missions were never created. Fix: add
   skipReview:true to defaultParams.

2. useKubescape/useTrivy cache tests (2 failures): source hooks were
   refactored to consume Promise.allSettled-shaped results from
   settledWithConcurrency, but test mocks still used Promise.all (which
   returns plain values, not {status,value} objects). Fix: change mocks
   to Promise.allSettled.

3. concurrent-mutation-safety (3 failures): fetchPodIssuesViaAgent,
   fetchDeploymentsViaAgent, fetchWorkloadsFromAgent, and
   fetchSecurityIssuesViaKubectl still mutated a shared accumulator
   inside settledWithConcurrency callbacks. Fix: return values from
   callbacks and aggregate after settlement. Also fix empty-suite error
   when zero violations exist.

Separately, useCachedLLMd.ts had the same shared-mutation pattern in
fetchLLMdModels — refactored identically.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
